name: Chocolate Upside-Down Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, salt, sugar, and baking powder.
2. Add the milk to the dry ingredients and mix well until just combined.
3. Melt the chocolate and butter in a separate saucepan over low heat, then let cool slightly before adding it to the cake batter. Mix until smooth.
4. Pour the batter into a 9 x 13 inch greased baking pan.
5. In another bowl, combine the sugar, brown sugar, and cocoa powder.
6. Sprinkle this mixture evenly over the top of the batter.
7. Carefully pour boiling water over the sugar mixture, making sure it covers the entire surface.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Serving Ideas:
Serve warm plain or with ice cream or whipped cream.
